ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "rented_bike_count" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the rentals occurred */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday indicator */,
  "functioning_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day was a functioning day */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES rental_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental associated with this weather data */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed_m_s" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "visibility_10m" INTEGER /* Visibility at 10 meters */,
  "dew_point_temperature_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "solar_radiation_mj_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in megajoules per square meter */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "snowfall_cm" REAL /* Snowfall in centimeters */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date is a holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental statistic record */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals recorded */,
  "total_bikes" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes rented */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded during rentals */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity recorded during rentals */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the rental location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the rental location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type (e.g., Mountain, Road) */,
  "availability_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bike type is currently available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental being paid for */,
  "amount" REAL /* Payment amount */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_payments_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental the feedback is associated with */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental location */,
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_inventories_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES rental_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_inventories_bike_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_type_id") REFERENCES bike_types ("bike_type_id")
)
